sentence: 他在一家汽车制造厂工作。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā qìchē zhìzàochǎng gōngzuò.
english: He works at a car manufacturing plant.

sentence: 爸爸每周末都在院子里除草。
pinyin: Bàba měi zhōumò dōu zài yuànzi lǐ chúcǎo.
english: Dad weeds the yard every weekend.

sentence: 南方今年夏天遭受了严重的洪灾。
pinyin: Nánfāng jīnnián xiàtiān zāoshòu le yánzhòng de hóngzāi.
english: The south suffered severe flooding this summer.

sentence: 这份文件可以作为他清白的佐证。
pinyin: Zhè fèn wénjiàn kěyǐ zuòwéi tā qīngbái de zuǒzhèng.
english: This document can serve as corroboration of his innocence.

sentence: 皮肤上的感受器能感知冷热。
pinyin: Pífū shang de gǎnshòuqì néng gǎnzhī lěng rè.
english: The sensory receptors in the skin can detect hot and cold.
